{{Quote|You are the ones I seek. I have employment for you to do, if interested you are. Several crates of spice has my employer — Nigel VI they are on, Lohopa II they need to go. Transportation they need, pay well we will. Five thousand credits, twenty thousand more upon delivery.|Und'l|<ref name="P" />}}
'''Lohopa II''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony in the [[Lohopa system/Legends|Lohopa system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], on the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]]. The local mining operations managed to resist [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] takeover attempts. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] developed a growing travel business due to its location on the Corridor. The local day was 25 standard hours long; its year was 414 local days long.

{{Planet-stub}}
